svg.text: 7 Mistakes That Kill Order Flow Traders
Order flow gives you the truest signal in markets — and the fastest way to over-trade and blow up

g.text: #1 · Trading every imbalance
Imbalances appear hundreds of times per session. Wait
for STACKED imbalances at structural levels.
Fix: minimum 3 stacked at HVN/LVN/POC
#2 · Ignoring HTF context
Order flow IS lower-timeframe info. Without daily/weekly
bias, you'll fade strong trends and lose.
Fix: mark daily POC, VAH, VAL before session
#3 · Cumulative Delta as standalone signal
CVD diverging at random levels gives noise. Only valid
at extremes aligned with structural reference.
Fix: CVD divergence + S/R confluence required
#4 · Trading thin liquidity hours
During lunch (12-13 ET) or globex, footprint shows noise.
Wide spreads + manipulation kill setups.
Fix: trade RTH only · 9:30-11:30 + 14:00-16:00 ET
#5 · Chasing momentum on first signal
First green delta after pullback → premature. Wait for
confirmation: stacked imbalance OR absorption.
Fix: never enter on the first bar of a signal
#6 · Tape paralysis
Watching every tick = analysis paralysis. Footprint should
CONFIRM what you already see on chart, not replace it.
Fix: chart first, footprint as confluence
#7 · Trusting fake order book activity
Spoofing is rampant. Huge DOM levels often disappear.
Filled volume > resting volume.
Fix: trust footprint (what TRADED), not DOM (what RESTS)
